meaning: n.鍥村牭鏀跨瓥,鐗靛埗鏀跨瓥
examples: Fire crews are hoping they can achieve full containment of the fire before the winds pick up.
Small spills and leaks inside containment.
That letter was opened at the city government's mail facility, in a biochemical containment box.
Similarly, drug firms are struggling to come to grips with cost containment and demanding purchasers.
